message.content:
{
  "homework": {
    "sessionInformation": {
      "sessionNumber": "1",
      "sessionTitle": "My Childhood",
      "subject": "English Language and Literature",
      "grade": "Class IX / 9",
      "difficultyLevel": "Balanced",
      "learningPace": "Balanced",
      "estimatedHomeworkDuration": "45 minutes"
    },
    "homework": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "type": "Reading_Comprehension_Analysis",
        "title": "Textual Analysis of 'My Childhood'",
        "learningOutcomeIds": ["LO_1_Literary_Appreciation", "LO_2_Critical_Thinking"],
        "topicCoverage": ["Narrative Voice", "Childhood Memories", "Social Context"],
        "difficulty": "Medium",
        "marks": 5,
        "estimatedTime": "10 minutes",
        "instructions": "Read the text 'My Childhood' carefully. Identify three specific instances where the author uses descriptive language to evoke a sense of nostalgia or childhood innocence. Quote these lines and explain how they contribute to the overall theme.",
        "question": "Select three passages from the text that best illustrate the author's childhood environment. For each passage, write a short paragraph (50-70 words) explaining the literary device used and its effect on the reader.",
        "options": [],
        "answerSpace": "Paragraph response required",
        "visualRequirement": "None",
        "expectedResponse": "The student should identify specific quotes related to childhood settings or feelings, correctly name a literary device (e.g., imagery, metaphor), and explain its impact on the theme of nostalgia."
      },
      {
        "id": 2,
        "type": "Writing_Functional",
        "title": "Reflective Essay: My Own Childhood",
        "learningOutcomeIds": ["LO_3_Creative_Writing", "LO_4_Self_Expression"],
        "topicCoverage": ["Personal Narrative", "Descriptive Writing", "Reflection"],
        "difficulty": "Medium-High",
        "marks": 10,
        "estimatedTime": "25 minutes",
        "instructions": "Write a reflective essay (300-400 words) titled 'My Childhood'. Draw inspiration from the style and themes of 'My Childhood' but focus on your own experiences. Include specific details about a place, a person, or an event that shaped your early years.",
        "question": "Compose a descriptive narrative essay reflecting on your childhood. Ensure you include a clear introduction, body paragraphs with specific examples, and a concluding reflection on how these memories influence you today.",
        "options": [],
        "answerSpace": "Essay format required",
        "visualRequirement": "None",
        "expectedResponse": "A well-structured essay demonstrating the ability to recall specific memories, use descriptive language effectively, and reflect on personal growth or values derived from childhood experiences."
      },
      {
        "id": 3,
        "type": "Vocabulary_Contextual",
        "title": "Word Usage and Synonyms",
        "learningOutcomeIds": ["LO_5_Vocabulary_Development"],
        "topicCoverage": ["Contextual Meaning", "Synonyms", "Usage"],
        "difficulty": "Low-Medium",
        "marks": 3,
        "estimatedTime": "8 minutes",
        "instructions": "From the text 'My Childhood', select five words that are central to the theme of childhood or nostalgia. For each word, write a new sentence that uses the word in a different context than it appears in the text.",
        "question": "List 5 key vocabulary words from the chapter. For each word, provide: 1) The meaning as used in the text, 2) A synonym, and 3) A new sentence using the word in a different context.",
        "options": [],
        "answerSpace": "Table or list format",
        "visualRequirement": "None",
        "expectedResponse": "Accurate identification of vocabulary words, correct synonyms, and creative usage of those words in new contexts demonstrating understanding beyond the text."
      },
      {
        "id": 4,
        "type": "Critical_Thinking_Comparative",
        "title": "Comparing Childhood Eras",
        "learningOutcomeIds": ["LO_6_Social_Awareness", "LO_7_Analytical_Writing"],
        "topicCoverage": ["Social Change", "Comparison", "Observation"],
        "difficulty": "High",
        "marks": 5,
        "estimatedTime": "12 minutes",
        "instructions": "Compare the childhood experiences described in 'My Childhood' with those of children today. Create a Venn diagram (drawn on paper) or a comparison table highlighting at least three similarities and three differences regarding play, education, or family life.",
        "question": "Analyze the text to identify aspects of the author's childhood. Compare these with your own or modern childhood experiences. Present your findings in a structured format (table or list) covering: 1) Play activities, 2) Educational methods, 3) Family interactions.",
        "options": [],
        "answerSpace": "Comparison table or diagram description",
        "visualRequirement": "Draw a Venn diagram or create a comparison table showing similarities and differences.",
        "expectedResponse": "A logical comparison identifying valid similarities and differences between the historical context of the text and modern life, demonstrating critical thinking about social changes."
      },
      {
        "id": 5,
        "type": "Parent_Engagement_Observation",
        "title": "Family Story Interview",
        "learningOutcomeIds": ["LO_8_Communication_Skills"],
        "topicCoverage": ["Oral History", "Listening Skills", "Interviewing"],
        "difficulty": "Medium",
        "marks": 2,
        "estimatedTime": "10 minutes (plus interview time)",
        "instructions": "Interview a parent or grandparent about their childhood. Ask them about one specific game they played or a tradition they followed. Write down three key points from their story and share one interesting fact with the class.",
        "question": "Conduct a short interview with an elder family member about their childhood. Record three interesting details they shared. In your homework notebook, write a brief summary (100 words) of what you learned from this conversation.",
        "options": [],
        "answerSpace": "Summary paragraph",
        "visualRequirement": "None",
        "expectedResponse": "A concise summary demonstrating active listening and the ability to synthesize oral information into written text."
      }
    ],
    "summary": {
      "totalQuestions": 5,
      "totalMarks": 25,
      "estimatedCompletionTime": "65 minutes",
      "learningOutcomesCovered": [
        "LO_1_Literary_Appreciation",
        "LO_2_Critical_Thinking",
        "LO_3_Creative_Writing",
        "LO_4_Self_Expression",
        "LO_5_Vocabulary_Development",
        "LO_6_Social_Awareness",
        "LO_7_Analytical_Writing",
        "LO_8_Communication_Skills"
      ],
      "topicsCovered": [
        "Narrative Voice",
        "Childhood Memories",
        "Social Context",
        "Personal Narrative",
        "Descriptive Writing",
        "Reflection",
        "Contextual Meaning",
        "Synonyms",
        "Usage",
        "Social Change",
        "Comparison",
        "Observation",
        "Oral History",
        "Listening Skills",
        "Interviewing"
      ],
      "subtopicsCovered": [
        "Literary Devices in Text",
        "Nostalgia and Imagery",
        "Reflective Essay Structure",
        "Vocabulary Contextualization",
        "Historical vs. Modern Childhood",
        "Family Oral Traditions"
      ],
      "taskDistribution": {
        "Reading_Analysis": 1,
        "Writing_Creative": 1,
        "Vocabulary": 1,
        "Critical_Thinking": 1,
        "Parent_Engagement": 1
      },
      "homeExperimentIncluded": false,
      "parentEngagementIncluded": true
    }
  }
}
